## Checklist

- [ ] `pnpm check` passes (typecheck + lint + format)
- [ ] Prod build passes (`pnpm build`)
- [ ] Prisma schema changes include a migration (`pnpm db:migrate --name ...`)
- [ ] No `@ts-ignore`, `ignoreDeprecations`, or warning silencers added
- [ ] New env vars documented in `.env.example` + README
